center.name: 尼科亚半岛
center.summary: 尼科亚半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括小灰頭稚冠雉、Ivory-billed woodcreeper、Rufous-backed wren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ultimus, Costa Rica's Nicoya Peninsula The ivory-billed woodcreeper inhabits a variety of forested landscapes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nicoyae, the Nicoya Peninsula of northwestern Costa Rica This large wren occurs in lowlands and foothills from sea level up to elevation in Costa Rica and as high as in El Salvador

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Plain chachalacas can often be found in low scrubland The plain chachalaca is found from Texas, in the Lower Rio Grande, through the eastern coast of Mexico, the Yucatán Peninsula, Belize, northern Guatemala, northern Honduras and just into the north central part of Nicaragua, with a small population on the Nicoya Peninsula of northern Costa Rica
